districts.name: Moving Gate
districts.summary: A flower arch relocates between arrivals and insists this has always been the entrance.
districts.featureDescription: Roots gather their soil into little bags whenever the road grows too certain.

districts.name: Festival After
districts.summary: Stalls, ribbons, and music remain vividly present despite the absence of any agreed festival.
districts.featureDescription: Footprints perform last night's dances without feet.

districts.name: Lawless Gardens
districts.summary: Gardeners cultivate colors, distances, and minor repeals of natural law.
districts.featureDescription: Its clipped mouth chews paper laws into bright migrating beetles.

landmarks.name: the bone circle where rain waits
landmarks.description: Bright rain hangs motionless inside a ring of antlers until somebody tells it where to fall.
